title: Array Technologies 2025 Revenue and 2026 Outlook
text:
Array Technologies 2025 Revenue and 2026 Outlook

2025 Financial Performance:
Array Technologies achieved strong growth in 2025, with full-year revenue reaching $1.284 billion, representing a 40% increase compared to 2024's $915.8 million. The company recorded an adjusted EBITDA of $187.6 million and adjusted diluted EPS of $0.67.

The company ended the year with a record orderbook of $2.2 billion, which included approximately $100 million from the APA Solar acquisition. Volume growth reached 35% for the full year.

2026 Guidance:
For the upcoming year, the company projects:

- Revenue: $1.4 billion to $1.5 billion
- Adjusted EBITDA: $200 million to $230 million
- Adjusted EPS: $0.65 to $0.75

Management expects approximately a 40:60 split between first-half and second-half revenue in 2026, with first-quarter revenue anticipated at roughly $200 million.

Key Context:
Despite strong top-line growth, 2025 results included a $29.5 million inventory valuation charge and a $102.6 million goodwill impairment related to the 2022 STI acquisition, which pressured GAAP profitability metrics.
